channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: Trump condemns SCOTUS justices, announces new global tariffs after major ruling
item.description: President Trump on Friday outlined a new plan to impose his global tariffs after the Supreme Court struck down most of the levies as illegal — a decis...

item.title: Trump imposes 10% tariffs on all countries after SCOTUS struck down earlier tariffs
item.description: President Trump signed an order that will impose 10% tariffs on imports from all countries, just hours after the Supreme Court struck down a different...

item.title: US military strikes another alleged drug boat in eastern Pacific, killing 3
item.description: The U.S. military says it has carried out another deadly strike on a vessel accused of trafficking drugs in the eastern Pacific Ocean

item.title: Trump says he has signed order for new 10% tariff after Supreme Court ruling
item.description: Trump laid out alternative ways to impose his tariffs after the Supreme Court struck down most of the levies as illegal, a decision he called "deeply ...

item.title: 2/20: The Takeout with Major Garrett
item.description: Supreme Court strikes down Trump's emergency tariffs; U.S. and Canada to face off for gold medal in men's hockey

item.title: See the Olympics schedule for the 2026 Milano Cortina Games
item.description: This is what you need to know about when the 2026 Milano Cortina Winter Olympics start and end, along with key games and events on the schedule.

item.title: Judge who held DOJ lawyer in contempt blasts handling of immigration cases
item.description: A federal judge who took the extraordinary step of holding a government lawyer in contempt of court earlier this week blasted the Justice Department f...

item.title: WATCH: Reese's heir accuses Hershey of cutting corners
item.description: Brad Reese explains why he believes ingredient changes undermine his grandfather's original creation.

item.title: 2/20: CBS Evening News
item.description: Trump lashes out at Supreme Court after justices strike down his tariffs; Man's cat sanctuary naps still helping rescue expand years after they first ...

item.title: Nancy Guthrie case may see resources scaled back as leads come up empty: Sources
item.description: Investigators looking into the kidnapping of Nancy Guthry believe the case would soon have to move into a new phase with fewer dedicated resources, so...

item.title: Supreme Court strikes down Trump’s sweeping tariffs, sparking fierce pushback and vow of new levies
item.description: President Donald Trump says he’s imposing a temporary global tariff of 10% after his far-reaching tariff regimen was struck down by the Supreme Court.

item.title: NASA targets March for first moon mission by Artemis astronauts after fueling test success
All truckers and bus drivers will be required to take commercial driver’s license tests in English
